q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: The sink is xml.dom.minidom.parseString which is an unsafe XML parser that can lead to XML bomb (billion laughs/quadratic blowup) attacks, especially with external entities enabled via parser.setFeature(xml.sax.handler.feature_external_ges, True).

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: not evaluated because Q1 was true
